understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player on the grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes that immediately end the run, within the per-attempt turn limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT to shift one tile horizontally; after that move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' which causes an immediate loss), or reach the goal '+'. CLICK targets a specific coordinate [x,y] to interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable 'x' blocks) without moving the player, typically to open new fall paths in the gravity direction. UNDO reverts the previous action for recovery from mistakes.

understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT to shift one tile horizontally; after that move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes 'u'/'v' which causes an immediate loss), or reach the goal '+'.
